pi_items.source: Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, which write and read the synthetic tip at this path.
Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh, which extracts the dynamically generated Tor HiddenService URL and writes it to this path.
Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh, which specifically generates a GPG key for this exact email and exports it to the mock server.

privileged_info_summary: The evidence file path, onion URL file, and target GPG email exactly match the metadata claims. The task dynamically spawns a synthetic local Tor HiddenService and sets the GPG email to 'secure@drop.local', writes the evidence text to '/home/ga/Documents/evidence_tip.txt', and places the onion link in '/home/ga/Desktop/securedrop_address.txt'. All paths are fully confirmed by the setup and export bash scripts.
